creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
-USES=           desktop-file-utils pkgconfig python shared-mime-info tar:xz
+USES=           desktop-file-utils pkgconfig python shared-mime-info tar:xz fortran

Is how that should work, but I am still seeing some issues with that... the package works though...
